item.author: neloyahmed

item.title: 添加了一个新帖子 | Added a new post
item.description:
茹陈冲

发表于一旦被暂停，ruchernchong 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

解除暂停后，ruchernchong 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，ruchernchong 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 ruchernchong 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

感谢您保护 DEV 社区 👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 以下是标记 ruchernchong 的方法：

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 ruchernchong 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Ru Chern Chong

Posted on Dec 20

Once suspended, ruchernchong will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, ruchernchong will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by ruchernchong will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If ruchernchong is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Thanks for keeping DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻 safe. Here is what you can do to flag ruchernchong:

ruchernchong consistently posts content that violates DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging ruchernchong will restore default visibility to their posts.
item.author: ruchernchong

item.title: 网站主题转换器 | Website Theme Changer
item.description:
一旦暂停，b1bxonty 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被删除。

解除暂停后，b1bxonty 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，b1bxonty 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 b1bxonty 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

感谢您保护 DEV 社区 👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 您可以通过以下方式标记 b1bxonty：

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 b1bxonty 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Once suspended, b1bxonty will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, b1bxonty will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by b1bxonty will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If b1bxonty is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Thanks for keeping DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻 safe. Here is what you can do to flag b1bxonty:

b1bxonty consistently posts content that violates DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging b1bxonty will restore default visibility to their posts.
item.author: b1bxonty
